---
pagetitle: "Colin Heeneman"
page-layout: full
---

::: hero
<h1 class="hero-name">

Colin Heeneman

</h1>

<p class="hero-title">

**Researcher / Quantitative & Qualitative Policy Analyst**

</p>

<p class="hero-tagline">

Blending data and egalitarian values to analyze public problems.

</p>

::: quick-links
[Email Me](mailto:colinheen@outlook.com){.btn .btn-primary} [GitHub](https://github.com/colin-heeneman){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::

## Featured Projects

::: project-cards
::: project-card
<h3><a href="projects/ada-parc.html">ADA‑PARC Project</a></h3>

<p>An interactive Shiny and Tableau-based platform that visualizes quality‑of‑life outcomes for people with disabilities across U.S. geographies.</p>
:::

::: project-card
<h3><a href="projects/mood-disorders.html">Correlates of Mood Disorders</a></h3>

<p>Uses CDC health survey data to model how modifiable behaviors and non‑modifiable demographics predict depression and anxiety among adults, revealing actionable public health targets.</p>
:::

::: project-card
<h3><a href="projects/wic.html">WIC Program Evaluation</a></h3>

<p>Applies a regression discontinuity design to synthetic data to estimate the impact of the Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) on birth weight outcomes.</p>
:::
:::
